name: SC-01 Data Pipeline — Artefakt

parameters.context: Retrieve all pending orders (status='pending') from the orders table, transform them to the ERP format (fields: order_id, customer_name, total_eur), and push the result to the ERP system. Confirm success.

parameters.tools: [{"name":"sql_query","description":"Execute SQL SELECT against the ERP database. Input: {\"query\": \"<SQL>\"}"},{"name":"transform_data","description":"Transform raw SQL rows to ERP format. Input: {\"rows\": [...]}"},{"name":"erp_push","description":"Push transformed data to the ERP system. Input: {\"payload\": [...]}"}]

_comment: SC-01 Data Pipeline Benchmark — Artefakt (n8n Agentic Pack). Requires OPENAI_API_KEY in n8n environment variables.
